summary: Iteration 222 — Frontend-only verification of MoneySmart-style Retirement Planner + Contribution Calculator rewrite. All 17 acceptance criteria pass. /retirement-planner renders new linear sectioned page with sticky Results panel; legacy 7-tab workbench preserved at /retirement-planner-workbench. /contribution-calculator renders with 5 sections, 6 investment-option presets, alt-fund compare, suggest-optimal, and live recalc. RetirementHub regression clean. No console errors on the two new pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts emits transient 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warnings on the retirement planner during first paint inside the sticky Results panel. Not blocking (chart renders correctly within 200ms) but could be silenced by setting a minHeight on the ResponsiveContainer wrapper.

/advisor-command-center logs 'Error fetching data: TypeError: Failed to fetch' on mount (pre-existing, comes from src_pages_AdvisorCommandCenter_jsx — unrelated to this iteration). Page itself renders fully with page-shell, KPIs, Next-best-actions cards. Worth investigating in a future iteration to suppress the noisy console error.

retirement_planner.six_sections_in_order: PASS — section-about-you, section-income, section-super, section-other, section-spending, section-advanced all present + visible
retirement_planner.relationship_toggle: PASS — clicking seg-relationship-couple reveals section-about-partner; seg-relationship-single hides it again
retirement_planner.chart: PASS — 2 recharts areas + 1 ReferenceLine for retirement age
retirement_planner.live_recalc_salary: PASS — input-your-salary 95000→150000 changes result-income $47k→$55k and super $1.09M→$1.38M within 1.5s
retirement_planner.advanced_section: PASS — section-advanced has 4 inputs (Investment return 6.5%, Inflation 2.5%, Total fees 0.85%, Life expectancy override). toggle-advanced present.

retirement_planner_workbench.tabs_discoverable: PASS — all 7 legacy tabs found: Overview, People, Assets, Income, Expenses, Assumptions, Projection

contribution_calculator.five_sections_in_order: PASS — section-you-fund, section-your-super, section-fund-fees, section-investment-option, section-compare
contribution_calculator.six_investment_options: PASS — opt-cash, opt-conservative, opt-moderate, opt-balanced, opt-growth, opt-high_growth all present
contribution_calculator.default_balanced_selected: PASS — opt-balanced has 'border-[#1a2744] bg-slate-50 ring-1 ring-[#1a2744]/20'
contribution_calculator.option_selection_swap: PASS — clicking opt-growth gives it ring-1; opt-balanced loses ring-1
contribution_calculator.chart_gold_fill: PASS — recharts area fills with 'url(#balGold)' gradient using #D4A84C stops
contribution_calculator.toggle_compare: PASS — toggle-compare reveals 3 alt-fund fee inputs
contribution_calculator.alt_fund_summary: PASS — alt-fund-summary appears with 'Alternative fund $1.68M Difference +$400k' when alt fees change
contribution_calculator.btn_suggest_optimal: PASS — clicking populates input-salary-sac from '0' to '15600' (positive), toast: 'Suggested $15,600 salary sacrifice — fills concessional cap, stays below Div 293.'
contribution_calculator.live_recalc_salary_sac: PASS — input-salary-sac 0→20000 changes result-balance $2.08M→$2.90M (higher than initial $1.74M baseline)

retirement_hub_regression.tabs: PASS — both 'Retirement Planner' and 'Contribution Calculator' tabs discoverable
retirement_hub_regression.embedded_components: PASS — Contribution Calculator tab embeds [data-testid='contribution-calculator'] (verified visually: Step 1 'You & your super fund', Result panel 'Balance at age 67 $1.74M', gold chart, Step 5 Compare visible)

advisor_command_center_regression.renders_fully: PASS — Command center renders Next-best-actions cards, KPIs, Advisor intelligence feed
advisor_command_center_regression.console_errors: Pre-existing 'TypeError: Failed to fetch' from AdvisorCommandCenter_jsx mount effect — unrelated to this iteration (not introduced by retirement/contribution changes). Page UI itself fully renders.

console_health.advisor_command_center: 2 pre-existing fetch errors (unrelated to this iteration)

test_credentials: None required — localStorage flags only (wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser')
context_for_next_testing_agent: MoneySmart-style retirement planner at /retirement-planner and contribution calculator at /contribution-calculator are verified end-to-end (all 17 ACs in iter 222 review request pass). Legacy 7-tab workbench preserved at /retirement-planner-workbench (linked via [data-testid='link-advanced-workbench']). RetirementHub at /retirement-confidence embeds both new components in its 2 tabs. Two pre-existing minor concerns flagged for future polish: (1) transient recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warning on planner sticky panel first paint, (2) AdvisorCommandCenter mount-effect fetch failure (unrelated to this iter). Neither blocks user flow.
